title: When life gets busy again: Why your life insurance deserves a second look
description: BUSINESS NEWS - As the year settles into its...
bodyText: [{"type":"contributor","text":"George Kolbe, Momentum","contributorName":"George Kolbe, Momentum","contributorDate":"Friday, 30 January 2026, 05:57"},{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Why life insurance is more than a “grudge purchase” and forms the foundation of financial resilience."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - As the year settles into its normal rhythm, most South African households move quickly from festive spending and holiday mode into the realities of school fees, debt commitments, and structured routines.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - As the year settles into its normal rhythm, most South African households move quickly from festive spending and holiday mode into the realities of school fees, debt commitments, and structured routines."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It’s a familiar ‘back to reality’ moment, one that highlights how quickly life’s responsibilities return to centre stage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Because life doesn’t pause when finances are stretched, and neither should the protection you have in place for the people who rely on you financially.","html":"Because life doesn’t pause when finances are stretched, and neither should the protection you have in place for the people who rely on you financially."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It’s a sobering reminder that life’s responsibilities never pause, and neither should the protection you have in place for the people who rely on you financially.","html":"It’s a sobering reminder that life’s responsibilities never pause, and neither should the protection you have in place for the people who rely on you financially."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This transition back to normal life is not only about budgeting; it’s also a powerful opportunity to reassess one of the most important foundations of financial well-being: ensuring your family’s future is protected.","html":"This transition back to normal life is not only about budgeting; it’s also a powerful opportunity to reassess one of the most important foundations of financial well-being: ensuring your family’s future is protected."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Reframing protection: more than a debit order"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Life insurance is sometimes viewed as a ‘grudge purchase’, but this view misses its true purpose.","html":"Life insurance is sometimes viewed as a ‘grudge purchase’, but this view misses its true purpose."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Life insurance isn’t just another monthly expense; it’s a future income replacement tool which should form the basis of every household’s financial planning. It’s a long-term act of care that ensures your family can continue their lives with stability, even in your absence or if you are unable to perform your occupation due to serious illness, injury, or disability.","html":"Life insurance isn’t just another monthly expense; it’s a future income replacement tool which should form the basis of every household’s financial planning. It’s a long-term act of care that ensures your family can continue their lives with stability, even in your absence or if you are unable to perform your occupation due to serious illness, injury, or disability."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As you start your normal routines: school runs, budget updates, bond repayments, and grocery shopping, you’re reminded of the responsibilities shaping your family’s daily life.","html":"As you start your normal routines: school runs, budget updates, bond repayments, and grocery shopping, you’re reminded of the responsibilities shaping your family’s daily life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Life insurance is the invisible safety net that keeps these pillars intact, should the unexpected happen and your income suddenly fall away. It is designed to provide financial stability when your family needs it most.","html":"Life insurance is the invisible safety net that keeps these pillars intact, should the unexpected happen and your income suddenly fall away. It is designed to provide financial stability when your family needs it most."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"When tragedy strikes, your family shouldn’t face an immediate financial crisis on top of emotional trauma. Reliable life cover ensures continuity and financial success for you and your family."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If planned for correctly, it can replace the income you would have earned over the coming years. It pays off outstanding debts, such as a home loan, so your family doesn’t risk losing their home. It also protects the education plan you’ve put in place, helping your children continue schooling uninterrupted.","html":"If planned for correctly, it can replace the income you would have earned over the coming years. It pays off outstanding debts, such as a home loan, so your family doesn’t risk losing their home. It also protects the education plan you’ve put in place, helping your children continue schooling uninterrupted."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It provides for everyday living expenses during a time of uncertainty.","html":"It provides for everyday living expenses during a time of uncertainty."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Life insurance is not optional; it's the ongoing promise that your financial support continues, even when you can't physically provide it.","html":"Life insurance is not optional; it's the ongoing promise that your financial support continues, even when you can't physically provide it."},{"type":"heading","text":"Review your cover as your life evolves","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"January is naturally a time for reassessing budgets, goals, and priorities. It’s also the ideal time for a life insurance review.","html":"January is naturally a time for reassessing budgets, goals, and priorities. It’s also the ideal time for a life insurance review."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your life isn’t static, and your financial plan shouldn’t be either. If you have experienced any life changes in the last year such as a promotion or salary increase, the birth or adoption of a child, adding new financial dependants, or if you have taken on new debt such as a larger home or car, your current life insurance policy might have significant gaps that could leave your loved ones exposed. ahead","html":"Your life isn’t static, and your financial plan shouldn’t be either. If you have experienced any life changes in the last year such as a promotion or salary increase, the birth or adoption of a child, adding new financial dependants, or if you have taken on new debt such as a larger home or car, your current life insurance policy might have significant gaps that could leave your loved ones exposed. ahead"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A regular review ensures your cover matches your responsibilities, income, and needs and the aspirations you have for your family.","html":"A regular review ensures your cover matches your responsibilities, income, and needs and the aspirations you have for your family."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Don’t let the ‘back to reality’ rush pass without safeguarding what matters most. Contact your accredited financial adviser this January for a comprehensive life insurance review.","html":"Don’t let the ‘back to reality’ rush pass without safeguarding what matters most. Contact your accredited financial adviser this January for a comprehensive life insurance review."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ensuring your protection aligns with your evolving goals is one of the most empowering decisions you can make for your family’s future — today and for the years.","html":"Ensuring your protection aligns with your evolving goals is one of the most empowering decisions you can make for your family’s future — today and for the years."}]

It pays off outstanding debts, such as a home loan, so your family doesn’t risk losing their home. It also protects the education plan you’ve put in place, helping your children continue schooling uninterrupted.","html":"If planned for correctly, it can replace the income you would have earned over the coming years. It’s also the ideal time for a life insurance review.","html":"January is naturally a time for reassessing budgets, goals, and priorities. It’s also the ideal time for a life insurance review."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your life isn’t static, and your financial plan shouldn’t be either. If you have experienced any life changes in the last year such as a promotion or salary increase, the birth or adoption of a child, adding new financial dependants, or if you have taken on new debt such as a larger home or car, your current life insurance policy might have significant gaps that could leave your loved ones exposed. ahead","html":"Your life isn’t static, and your financial plan shouldn’t be either. If you have experienced any life changes in the last year such as a promotion or salary increase, the birth or adoption of a child, adding new financial dependants, or if you have taken on new debt such as a larger home or car, your current life insurance policy might have significant gaps that could leave your loved ones exposed. ahead"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A regular review ensures your cover matches your responsibilities, income, and needs and the aspirations you have for your family.","html":"A regular review ensures your cover matches your responsibilities, income, and needs and the aspirations you have for your family."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Don’t let the ‘back to reality’ rush pass without safeguarding what matters most. Contact your accredited financial adviser this January for a comprehensive life insurance review.","html":"Don’t let the ‘back to reality’ rush pass without safeguarding what matters most. Contact your accredited financial adviser this January for a comprehensive life insurance review."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ensuring your protection aligns with your evolving goals is one of the most empowering decisions you can make for your family’s future — today and for the years.","html":"Ensuring your protection aligns with your evolving goals is one of the most empowering decisions you can make for your family’s future — today and for the years."}]

images.alt: When life gets busy again: Why your life insurance deserves a second look

author: George Kolbe, Momentum
teaser: Why life insurance is more than a “grudge purchase” and forms the foundation of financial resilience.
featuredCaption: January is naturally a time for reassessing budgets, goals, and priorities. It’s also the ideal time for a life insurance review. Photo: Pexels
